rule_text: AP Government sanction for a fresh charge LAPSES if not acted on for ONE YEAR from issue, unless specifically renewed; sanction is treated as 'acted upon' if any payment (whole or part) was made within the year — subsequent balance payments may then proceed against the same sanction.
verification_method: For tender file: check sanction order date is within 1 year of first action OR is specifically renewed; reject stale sanctions never acted upon

rule_text: AP Government servants entering into contracts with private firms/contractors for supply of stores or execution of works must follow the definite rules, orders, conditions and forms issued by Government; contracts containing UNUSUAL CONDITIONS or involving UNCERTAIN/INDEFINITE LIABILITY must only be made after obtaining the SPECIAL SANCTION of the Government, who will obtain necessary LEGAL AND FINANCIAL ADVICE in each case; material variations in existing contracts also require Government referral.
verification_method: For tenders containing non-standard SCC clauses, indemnities, or open-ended liability: check Government Special Sanction order on file with legal/financial advice trail

rule_text: AP claims against Government not preferred within ONE YEAR of becoming due cannot be presented without an Authority from Accountant-General/PAO Hyderabad; small claims up to Rs.500 presented within 3 years may be paid without pre-audit by AG/PAO.
verification_method: For contractor's bill claims: if claim_age > 1 year, check AG/PAO authorisation order; for claims <= Rs.500 within 3 years, pre-audit waiver applies
